name: Charleston, SC
author: PSWBSF
description:
Map of Charleston, South Carolina. Made using the Map Patcher by Kronifer and US Demand Generator by slurry.

Additional demand data as follows:

Airports

  • Charleston International Airport (ANC)

Universities

  • Medical University of South Carolina

  • Charleston Southern University

  • Trident Technical College

  • The Citadel

Entertainment/Tourism

  • Patriots Point Naval Museum

  • South Carolina Aquarium

  • Fort Sumter Visitors Center (includes ferry demand)

  • Fort Moultrie

  • Amtrak Station

Shopping

  • Tanger Outlets

  • Northwoods Mall

  • Citadel Mall

Military Bases

  • Joint Base Charleston (split into 2 demand points)

  • Naval Weapons Station (split into 3 demand points)

  • Coast Guard Station
